---
title: "Built Environment: The East Oakland Compost Center Project Proposal"
author:
  - name: Bella Kormos
    affiliation: UCSB Environmental Studies BS; Spanish minor 
categories: [Writing Sample]
image: oakland2.png
draft: false
---

[ENVS 155 Final Project](es155.pdf)

<iframe src="es155.pdf" width="100%" height="800px">

</iframe>
